name: PRISM
motive: Adaptive Invisible Shield: An intelligent envelope dome surrounding a person or object to stop physical threats, selectively manage and filter gases, and protect against extreme environmental dangers.
priority_reason: Defends physical assets and regulates survivability environments.
next_build: Integrate computer vision dynamic vector tracking, millimeter-wave radar, atmospheric chromatography monitoring, and pressurized HEPA gas filtering.
integration_role: Kattappa AI OS interprets threat warnings, routes telemetry to Cyber Shield, and operates safety barriers.
safety_boundary: Defensive alerting and atmospheric filtering only. Kinetic pulse deflectors must not hazard surrounding humans.
